metadata.description: 3–8 char prefix used to derive every resource name

Azure region for the workspace and App Insights

APIM SKU (must be Premium for the benchmark)

Name of the APIM service to configure

variables.$fxv#0:
<!--
  Policy fragment: shared-backend-rewrite
  Used by APIM-A. Routes every API to the single shared backend entity and
  reconstructs the original request path on top of /api/echo so the backend
  receives the full path the caller asked for.
-->
<fragment>
    <set-backend-service backend-id="shared-mock-backend" />
    <rewrite-uri template="@("/api/echo" + context.Request.OriginalUrl.Path + (string.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Request.OriginalUrl.QueryString) ? "" : "?" + context.Request.OriginalUrl.QueryString))" copy-unmatched-params="false" />
</fragment>

properties.description: Routes to shared backend and reconstructs the original path

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('apimServiceName'), format('api-shared-{0}', padLeft(range(1, parameters('apiCount'))[sub(range(1, parameters('apiCount'))[copyIndex()], 1)], 2, '0')), 'policy')]
dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/apis/operations', parameters('apimServiceName'), format('api-shared-{0}', padLeft(range(1, parameters('apiCount'))[sub(range(1, parameters('apiCount'))[sub(range(1, parameters('apiCount'))[copyIndex()], 1)], 1)], 2, '0')), 'get-resource')]

metadata.description: Name of the APIM service to configure
Hostname of the mock backend Function App (no scheme)
Number of APIs / backends to create

variables.$fxv#0:
<!--
  Policy fragment: per-api-passthrough
  Used by APIM-B. Each API references its own backend entity whose URL already
  encodes the correct path prefix, so no rewrite-uri is needed.
  Backend selection happens at the API scope; this fragment is intentionally
  trivial so policy-evaluation cost matches APIM-A.
-->
<fragment>
    <!-- backend-id is set per-API by apim-b-per-api-backend.bicep before invoking this fragment. -->
</fragment>

properties.description: Trivial passthrough fragment (kept for fairness with APIM-A)

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('apimServiceName'), format('api-perapi-{0}', padLeft(range(1, parameters('apiCount'))[sub(range(1, parameters('apiCount'))[copyIndex()], 1)], 2, '0')), 'policy')]
dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/apis/operations', parameters('apimServiceName'), format('api-perapi-{0}', padLeft(range(1, parameters('apiCount'))[sub(range(1, parameters('apiCount'))[sub(range(1, parameters('apiCount'))[copyIndex()], 1)], 1)], 2, '0')), 'get-resource')]
